headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 6 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 6 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 12 high, 17 medium, 10 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Belgrade Nikola Tesla (BEG/LYBE); plus 9 other bases. 17 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, fog / freezing fog and mist  — most notably around Sofia (SOF/LBSF), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) and Tuzla (TZL/LQTZ). Network hotspots: Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Leoš Janáček Airport Ostrava (OSR/LKMT) and 1 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, cold‑temperature performance penalties and mist. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Shirak (LWN/UDSG) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 6 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Belgrade Nikola Tesla (BEG/LYBE) — HIGH: fog; snow; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 0 ft | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties | Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Vilnius (VNO/EYVI) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 200 ft and 6 others. Worst affected now: Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH) — CRIT: mist; snow; runway contamination risk (drivers: approach minima limits, runway contamination / reduced braking, cold-temperature performance penalties) | Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 200 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, very low visibility) | Leoš Janáček Airport Ostrava (OSR/LKMT) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints, cold-temperature performance penalties) | Shirak (LWN/UDSG) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits). Changed since last run: Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY), Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE), Shirak (LWN/UDSG), Sofia (SOF/LBSF), Glasgow (GLA/EGPF), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Václav Havel Airport Prague (PRG/LKPR), Tuzla (TZL/LQTZ), İstanbul (IST/LTFM), Karlsruhe Baden-Baden (FKB/EDSB) and 2 others.
